OmniIntegrationProcedure.name: LeadershipChange_DataServiceIP

childElements.name: DM_FacilityTitleForLeadershipChange
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "CaseList" : "=%LA_FacilityTitle%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "ResultData", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DMLeaderShipChangeCase", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperPostAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: DRT_FacilityTitleForLeadershipChange
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "TypeOfChange" : "=%TypeOfChange%", "FacilityTitles" : "=%FacilityTitles%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "FacilityTitleList", "responseJSONNode" : "FacilityTitles", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DRTFacilityTitleForLeadershipChange", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "ignoreCache" : false, "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperTransformAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: LA_FacilityTitle
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { "CaseAccountId" : "=%ServiceAccountId%", "RecordTypeId" : "=%NecessaryValues:LeadershipChangeRecordTypeId%", "AssignedToId" : "=IF(%TypeOfChange%==\"New Leader - New Hire\",%NecessaryValues:VPOperationsId%,%NecessaryValues:ClinicianExperienceSpecialistId%)" }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "advancedMerge" : false, "advancedMergeMap" : [ ], "preventIntraListMerge" : false, "mergeFields" : [ ], "allowMergeNulls" : true, "hasPrimary" : false, "primaryListKey" : "", "sortBy" : [ ], "sortInDescendingOrder" : false, "mergeListsOrder" : [ "FacilityTitles" ], "filterListFormula" : "", "dynamicOutputFields" : "NecessaryValues:CaseFields", "updateFieldValue" : { "CaseSubject" : "=CONCAT(\"Service Account Leadership Change - \",Type,\" for \",Name)" }, "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "show" : null, "label" : "ListAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: SV_NecessaryValues1
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "elementValueMap" : { "CaseFields" : "=\"CaseSubject,CaseAccountId,Change,AssignedToId,RecordTypeId\"", "LeadershipChangeRecordTypeId" : "=QUERY(\"Select Id from RecordType where DeveloperName = 'Leadership_Change' AND SobjectType = 'Case'\")", "ClinicianExperienceSpecialistId" : "=QUERY(\"SELECT UserId FROM AccountTeamMember WHERE AccountId = '{0}' AND TeamMemberRole = 'Clinician Experience Specialist' limit 1\", %ServiceAccountId%)", "VPOperationsId" : "=QUERY(\"SELECT UserId FROM AccountTeamMember WHERE AccountId = '{0}' AND TeamMemberRole = 'VP Operations' limit 1 \", %ServiceAccountId%)" }, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "NecessaryValues", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "show" : null, "label" : "SetValues3", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: DM_LeaderShipChangeCase
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "CaseList" : "=%LA_HPF%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "ResultData", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DMLeaderShipChangeCase", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperPostAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: LA_HPF
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { "CaseAccountId" : "=%ServiceAccountId%", "RecordTypeId" : "=%NecessaryValues:LeadershipChangeRecordTypeId%" }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "advancedMerge" : false, "advancedMergeMap" : [ ], "preventIntraListMerge" : false, "mergeFields" : [ ], "allowMergeNulls" : true, "hasPrimary" : false, "primaryListKey" : "", "sortBy" : [ ], "sortInDescendingOrder" : false, "mergeListsOrder" : [ "HPFRecords" ], "filterListFormula" : "=Change<>$Vlocity.NULL", "dynamicOutputFields" : "NecessaryValues:CaseFields", "updateFieldValue" : { "CaseSubject" : "=CONCAT(\"Service Account Leadership Change - \",Change)", "AssignedToId" : "=IF(Change==\"Title Change\",DataQualityQueueId,ClinicianExperienceSpecialistId)" }, "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "show" : null, "label" : "ListAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: SV_NecessaryValues
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "elementValueMap" : { "CaseFields" : "=\"CaseSubject,CaseAccountId,PractitionerId,HPFId,Change,AssignedToId,RecordTypeId\"", "LeadershipChangeRecordTypeId" : "=QUERY(\"Select Id from RecordType where DeveloperName = 'Leadership_Change' AND SobjectType = 'Case'\")" }, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "NecessaryValues", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "show" : null, "label" : "SetValues3", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: DRE_GetHPF
SV_VPOPresent
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "elementValueMap" : { "VPOPresent" : "=COUNTQUERY(\"SELECT Id FROM AccountTeamMember WHERE AccountId = '{0}' AND TeamMemberRole = '{1}' AND UserId = '{2}' \",%ServiceAccountId%,\"VP Operations\",%$Vlocity.UserId%) > 0", "IsMemberOfVPODelegateQueue" : "=COUNTQUERY(\"SELECT Id FROM GroupMember WHERE Group.Name = '{0}' AND UserOrGroupId = '{1}'\",\"VPO Delegates\",%$Vlocity.UserId%) > 0" }, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "ResultData", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "show" : null, "label" : "SetValues1", "disOnTplt" : false }

OmniIntegrationProcedure.propertySetConfig: { "linkToExternalObject" : "", "trackingCustomData" : { }, "includeAllActionsInResponse" : false, "columnsPropertyMap" : [ ], "relationshipFieldsMap" : [ ], "labelSingular" : "", "labelPlural" : "", "description" : "", "nameColumn" : "", "rollbackOnError" : false, "chainableQueriesLimit" : 50, "chainableDMLStatementsLimit" : null, "chainableCpuLimit" : 2000, "chainableHeapSizeLimit" : null, "chainableDMLRowsLimit" : null, "chainableQueryRowsLimit" : null, "chainableSoslQueriesLimit" : null, "chainableActualTimeLimit" : null, "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "queueableChainableQueriesLimit" : 120, "queueableChainableCpuLimit" : 40000, "queueableChainableHeapSizeLimit" : 6, "ttlMinutes" : 5, "mockResponseMap" : { } }
